---
title: "Adam Dennett"
subtitle: "Professor of Urban Analytics, Bartlett Centre for Advanced Spatial Analysis (CASA), UCL"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: assets/MeCrop.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 18em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/adamdennett/
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/adam-dennett-b5b3a229/
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/adam_dennett
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"
      href: http://orcid.org/0000-0001-8036-0185
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?user=P_sHtmkAAAAJ&hl=en
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:a.dennett@ucl.ac.uk
toc: false
---

I'm a geographer with an interest in using data and quantitative methods
to understand how people and the systems they create work — frequently this
draws me to urban contexts and applied settings. On this site I keep my
various academic activities, projects and writing.

Head to the [Projects](projects.qmd) page for a live, auto-updating gallery of
the things I'm currently building on GitHub, or [About](about.qmd) for a bit
more on me.
